utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all details requested (including costs): 1) health_coverage: explicitly lists physical and mental health insurance with named plans, policy numbers, features, and a total health cost (€191/month). Fully specified with costs. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with plan name, policy number, features, and total property cost (€52/month). Fully specified with costs. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance base plan and an add-on, both with plan names, policy numbers, features, and a total travel cost (€113/month). Fully specified with costs. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services (premium support, partnership discounts) and states cost as included in base coverage. Costs are indicated (included), so specified. 5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual costs, savings vs previous, payment method, and effective date. Fully specified with a complete breakdown. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item named in the final coverage plan to the exact corresponding option name in the ground-truth ratings and return its rating. The final plan includes: PrimeCare Premium Physical Health, PrimeCare Premium Mental Health, PrimeHome Premium Coverage, PrimeTravel Premium Plan, and Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on. In the ground truth, these correspond to: Primary Health - PrimeCare Premium Plan (rating 6) for both physical and mental health; Property - PrimeHome Premium Coverage (rating 6); Travel - PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 6); Travel enhancement - Adventure Travel Coverage (rating 10).
